settings.editor: Recruit, Develop, and Retain Project Managers Faster And Better Than Your Competitors
↓  This is a placeholder video. Anthony to record an intro video.  ↓

As an AEC PM Corporate Partner you will be able to certify your project managers and

provide them with benefits that they can only receive with your organization.

settings.text: book a complimentary call to learn more

settings.editor:
As an AEC PM Corporate Partner you will be able to
Recruit, Develop, and Retain Project Managers by:

• Providing them with a custom, top notch project management development program which may include foundations in advanced topics

  • Certify them with EMI's industry wide AEC PM Certification

  • Give them access to PM Assist Micro, a series of 40 micro-learning videos, to reinforce their project management skills over their 2 year certification period.

  • Provide them with access to PM Assist Live which is a series of 8 webinars over 2 years that feature industry experts on trending AEC PM topics.

  • Provide them with AEC PM Premium, a premium video stream that provides advice from leading project managers globally. (See below for examples)

settings.text: book a complimentary call to learn more

settings.editor:
AEC PM Premium is an exclusive content stream to support and enhance the performance of project managers in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry. This service is available only to AEC PM Certification holders who are employed by EMI’s Corporate Partners.
 
You're certified AEC PMs will get:
  • High-Level Strategy Videos: Master the leadership, planning, and coordination techniques used by top AEC PMs.
  • Field-Tested Tactics: Gain practical skills to manage RFIs, submittals, scope changes, and schedule conflicts with confidence.
  • PM Quick Tips: Tap into expert advice from experienced project managers on how to tackle real-world challenges and improve daily performance.
  • On-Demand Flexibility: Access the premium content, anywhere — on their schedule, at their pace.
 
*Note: AEC PM Premium access is reserved for certified project managers currently employed by an
EMI Corporate Partner organization.

Managing AEC Projects Isn’t Just Difficult;
It’s High-Stakes

From juggling tight timelines and coordinating across disciplines to meeting demanding client expectations, project managers in architecture, engineering, and construction face constant pressure. Tools alone aren’t enough. Success requires strong leadership, clear communication, and real-world experience.

AEC PM Premium is built to support your project managers in these challenges, helping them lead more confidently and deliver better results at every stage of the project.

settings.text: book a complimentary call to learn more

Discover how to level up your project management impact today.
